pageContext.name: Ultramarines Outriders Bike
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Joytoy proudly present the Ultramarines Outriders Bike Collectible Figure!  The most elite of the Space Marine Chapters in the Imperium of Man, the Ultramarines from Warhammer 40k comes to life with this new series of 1:18 scale figures and accessories. Outrider Squads rove in advance of the main Space Marine lines, guarding flanks of larger formations or hunting down enemy infiltrators.   This Ultramarines Outrider Bike is a great addition to any Ultramarines figure (sold separately). Don't miss your chance to add it to your collection today!
